name: Rabbit with Apricots in Cabernet Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 oz Vinegar, red wine                       3 tbsp Oil, peanut
2 each Garlic, cloves, unpeeled             4 tbsp Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Bone the rabbit saddle, legs, and shoulders and cut the meat into cubes of about 1 ounce each.
2. Marinate the meat in the wine and vinegar with garlic and bouquet garni for 12 hours, covering rabbit with cheesecloth so it will not dry out.
3. Soak apricots in cold water for 1 hour, then drain.
4. Drain rabbit, reserving marinade and garniture. Dry rabbit well and season with salt and pepper.
5. In a heavy casserole, heat the oil and 2 tablespoons of butter.
6. Add the rabbit and brown on all sides (approximately 20 minutes until meat is gray).
7. Add garlic, bouquet garni, reserved marinade, apricots, and rabbit demi-glace. Cover and simmer for 20 - 30 minutes.
8. Remove bouquet garni and discard.
9. Retrieve cloves of garlic and remove the peel. Mash garlic into a paste with the remaining butter.
10. Remove the rabbit and apricots from the sauce, set aside and keep warm. Stir the garlic paste into the sauce a little at a time.
11. Arrange rabbit and apricots on a serving plate and cover with sauce.
